title: W(3,3)-E8 Correspondence Theorem: Standard Model from Finite Geometry
description: A complete derivation of the Standard Model of particle physics from the W(3,3) generalized quadrangle and E8 Lie algebra correspondence. The theory proves 60 pillars connecting combinatorial, topological, and algebraic structures to gauge symmetries, fermion generations, coupling constants, and mass hierarchies — with zero free parameters. All results are computationally verified by 280 automated tests.
notes: 60 proved pillars, 280 automated tests. Key predictions: sin²θ_W = 3/8 (exact), 3 generations topologically protected, spectral gap Δ=4 ensures proton stability and confinement.
